Class NativeVectorStorageFactory

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.nativ.mathematics.linearalgebra.vectors.NativeVectorStorageFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
VectorStorageFactory
public class NativeVectorStorageFactory extends Object implements VectorStorageFactory
Native implementation of VectorStorageFactory. Creates NativeVector instances for Real numbers.

  • Method Details

    • createDense

      public <E> VectorStorage<E> createDense(int dimension, Ring<E> ring)
      Description copied from interface: VectorStorageFactory
      Creates a new dense vector storage.
      Specified by:
      createDense in interface VectorStorageFactory
      Type Parameters:
      E - the element type
      Parameters:
      dimension - the dimension of the vector
      ring - the ring defining the element type and zero
      Returns:
      a new VectorStorage instance, or null if not supported

    • getPriority

      public int getPriority()
      Description copied from interface: VectorStorageFactory
      Returns the priority of this factory. Higher values are preferred.
      Specified by:
      getPriority in interface VectorStorageFactory
      Returns:
      priority
